mapper.sql: l.id, l.emp_id, l.leave_type, l.start_date, l.end_date, l.leave_days, l.reason, l.status, l.approver_id, l.approve_time, l.approve_remark, l.create_time, l.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , e.emp_name, e.emp_no, d.dept_name, a.emp_name as approver_name FROM sys_leave l LEFT JOIN sys_emp e ON l.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_emp a ON l.approver_id = a.id WHERE l.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM sys_leave l WHERE l.emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
SELECT , e.emp_name, e.emp_no, d.dept_name FROM sys_leave l LEFT JOIN sys_emp e ON l.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE l.status = 0 ORDER BY l.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_leave (emp_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, leave_days, reason, status) VALUES (#{empId}, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{leaveDays}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_leave WHERE status = #{status}
